tasks.label: Fetch Gliaxin Memory
tasks.command: curl -s "${env:GLIAXIN_API_URL}/v1/memory/search?query=${input:memoryQuery}&end_user_id=${env:GLIAXIN_USER_ID}&limit=8" -H "X-Api-Key: ${env:GLIAXIN_API_KEY}" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(m['content']) for m in d.get('memories',[])]" > .gliaxin-context.txt && echo 'Memory written to .gliaxin-context.txt'
